common.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?

welcome.privacy_notice: By creating an account, you confirm that you have read and understood our Privacy Policies

login.etb_subtitle: Enter the phone number associated with your SK Finance account
login.ntb_subtitle: We'll send a secure OTP to verify your number.
login.invalid_mobile: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number

otp.title_sms: We just sent you an SMS
otp.subtitle: Enter the {{length}}-digit code we sent to {{contact}}

mpin.intro_subtitle: Create a 4-digit PIN for quick login
mpin.setup_subtitle: Create a 4-digit MPIN for quick and secure access to your account.
mpin.confirm_subtitle: Enter the same 4-digit MPIN again to confirm.
mpin.error_weak: Please choose a more secure MPIN
mpin.error_mismatch: MPIN does not match. Please try again.
mpin.reset_success_subtitle: Please click the 'Login' button to proceed.

biometric.title: Enable Face ID
biometric.subtitle: Use Face ID for faster, secure access. You can change this anytime in settings.

login_success.title: Login Successful!
login_success.subtitle: You can access your dashboard quickly and safely.

forgot_mpin.title: Forgot mPIN
forgot_mpin.subtitle: To reset your MPIN, you need to verify your registered mobile number through OTP.

account_locked.title: Account temporarily locked
account_locked.subtitle: Too many incorrect PIN attempts. Try again after 30 minutes.

session_expired.title: Session expired
session_expired.subtitle: For your security, you've been logged out due to inactivity.

dashboard.status_subtitle: Our team will contact you soon..
dashboard.auto_debit_prompt: Never miss an EMI. Set up auto-debit.

products.detail_desc: At SK Finance, we offer loans to help you fulfill your dreams without worrying about finances.

kyc.title: Tell us more about you
kyc.subtitle_lead: Help us connect you with the right loan expert
kyc.subtitle_ntb: This helps us verify your identity
kyc.consent_text: The information provided will be used for processing your loan enquiry.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.disclaimer_text: Updates made here will only apply to your profile information.

update_mobile.title: Update Mobile Number
update_mobile.subtitle: Enter your new mobile number. A verification code will be sent to confirm the change.
update_mobile.label: New Mobile Number
update_mobile.consent: I agree that SKF will share the new mobile number entered by me with external agencies for verification purpose.
update_mobile.error_invalid: Enter valid mobile number starting with 6-9

update_email.title: Update Email Address
update_email.subtitle: Enter your new email address. All future communications will be sent to this email.
update_email.label: New Email Address

change_mpin.title: Change MPIN
change_mpin.subtitle: To change your MPIN, verify your registered mobile number through OTP.

address.title: Address
address.confirm_subtitle: We found the following address from your document.

payments.pay_subtitle: Select a Loan Account and Payment Type to make a payment
payments.payment_success_sub: Your payment has been completed successfully.

mandate.title: Auto-Debit Mandate
mandate.warning_text: Changing your auto-debit account will replace the existing mandate. You'll need to authorize the new account to continue EMI payments.
mandate.setup_subtitle: Your EMI will be automatically debited from this bank account every month.
mandate.authorize_subtitle: To activate auto-debit, please complete the bank process.

service_requests.title: Service Requests
service_requests.subtitle: How can we help you today?
service_requests.create_sub: Submit a new request for assistance
service_requests.track_sub: View status of your existing requests
service_requests.select_loan_sub: Choose the loan for this service request
service_requests.other_sub: Select a category and describe your issue
service_requests.upload_formats: Formats: jpg, png, pdf, etc. Max Size: 10MB

success.application_sub: Our team will review and contact you soon.
success.mobile_update_sub: Your mobile number will be updated within {{hours}} hours.
success.email_update_sub: Your email address will be updated within {{hours}} hours.
success.address_update_sub: Your address will be updated within 24 hours.
success.language_update_sub: Your Language Preference will be updated within 24 hours.
success.mandate_sub: Your Mandate Details will be updated within 24 hours.
success.service_sub: Your request will be processed within 24 hours.
